name: merkle audit log: every 100 appended entries triggers a signed checkpoint write to compliance/audit-checkpoints/<seq>.json
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance/audit-checkpoints .claude-tdd-pro/keys && echo "test-key" > .claude-tdd-pro/keys/audit.key && for i in $(seq 1 100); do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event "e$i" --actor t --data {} --signing-key "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/keys/audit.key" >/dev/null 2>&1; done && [ -f compliance/audit-checkpoints/0001.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
